scripts.start:replit: NODE_ENV=production GCOS_HOST=0.0.0.0 GCOS_DOMAIN=rmvi.org GCOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=replit GCOS_STORAGE_PROVIDER=database GCOS_DATABASE_SSL=1 GCOS_DATABASE_POOL_SIZE=5 GCOS_OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER=${GCOS_OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER:-cloudflare-r2} GCOS_OBJECT_VAULT_PATH=${GCOS_OBJECT_VAULT_PATH:-/var/lib/gcos/object-vault} GCOS_SERVE_WEB=1 GCOS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN=https://rmvi.org GCOS_HEALTHCHECK_URL=https://rmvi.org GCOS_MAX_BODY_BYTES=1048576 GCOS_ENABLE_DEV_RESET=0 GCOS_REQUIRE_API_AUTH=1 GCOS_LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT=8 GCOS_LOGIN_RATE_WINDOW_MS=300000 GCOS_MUTATION_RATE_LIMIT=2000 GCOS_MUTATION_RATE_WINDOW_MS=60000 GCOS_MANAGED_RESTORE_DRILL=1 node server/index.mjs
scripts.start:aws: NODE_ENV=production GCOS_API_PORT=${PORT:-8080} GCOS_HOST=0.0.0.0 GCOS_DOMAIN=rmvi.org GCOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=aws GCOS_STORAGE_PROVIDER=database GCOS_DATABASE_SSL=1 GCOS_DATABASE_POOL_SIZE=${GCOS_DATABASE_POOL_SIZE:-5} GCOS_OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER=${GCOS_OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER:-aws-s3} GCOS_SERVE_WEB=1 GCOS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN=https://rmvi.org GCOS_HEALTHCHECK_URL=https://rmvi.org GCOS_MAX_BODY_BYTES=1048576 GCOS_ENABLE_DEV_RESET=0 GCOS_REQUIRE_API_AUTH=1 GCOS_LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT=8 GCOS_LOGIN_RATE_WINDOW_MS=300000 GCOS_MUTATION_RATE_LIMIT=2000 GCOS_MUTATION_RATE_WINDOW_MS=60000 GCOS_MANAGED_RESTORE_DRILL=${GCOS_MANAGED_RESTORE_DRILL:-0} node server/index.mjs
scripts.start:firebase: NODE_ENV=production GCOS_API_PORT=${PORT:-8080} GCOS_HOST=0.0.0.0 GCOS_DOMAIN=rmvi.org GCOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=firebase GCOS_STORAGE_PROVIDER=${GCOS_STORAGE_PROVIDER:-firestore} GCOS_FIREBASE_NAMESPACE=${GCOS_FIREBASE_NAMESPACE:-production} GCOS_OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER=${GCOS_OBJECT_STORAGE_PROVIDER:-firebase-storage} GCOS_SERVE_WEB=1 GCOS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN=https://rmvi.org GCOS_HEALTHCHECK_URL=https://rmvi.org GCOS_MAX_BODY_BYTES=1048576 GCOS_ENABLE_DEV_RESET=0 GCOS_REQUIRE_API_AUTH=1 GCOS_LOGIN_RATE_LIMIT=8 GCOS_LOGIN_RATE_WINDOW_MS=300000 GCOS_MUTATION_RATE_LIMIT=2000 GCOS_MUTATION_RATE_WINDOW_MS=60000 GCOS_MANAGED_RESTORE_DRILL=${GCOS_MANAGED_RESTORE_DRILL:-0} node server/index.mjs
scripts.aws:run: npm run build && npm run start:aws
scripts.firebase:run: npm run build && npm run start:firebase
scripts.firebase:deploy: npm run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules,storage
scripts.replit:run: npm run build && npm run start:replit
